title: D4rkSpire Crystals
description: A high-performance, dark-themed resource pack optimized for Crystal PvP. Features sleek swords, fitted armor, and high-visibility crystals/anchors for Minecraft 1.16.2 through 1.16.5
body:
**💠 D4rkSpire_Crystal_Pack 💠** D4rkSpire_Crystal_Pack is a high-performance, aesthetics-first resource pack built specifically for the 1.16 Crystal PvP meta. Engineered for maximum visibility and a sleek dark look, this pack gives you the competitive edge in the versions where Crystal PvP truly shines.
  ⚔️ Combat Features
    1.16 Tactical Swords: Shortened Diamond and Netherite swords optimized for the 1.16 attack     speed and reach-combo mechanics.  
    High-Visibility Essentials: End Crystals and Respawn Anchors feature high-contrast textures and glowing cores—essential for hit-stacking and timing pops in 1.16.5.
    Fitted Armor: Redesigned, slimmed-down armor sets that remove the visual "bulk" of vanilla  models, perfect for maintaining a clear view of your opponent.
     PvP Optimization: Clean textures and optimized particles to ensure zero FPS drops during massive crystal explosions.
